name: H-Net Dynamic Sequence Chunking (Enc2-Inner5-Dec2, 512d)
author: Tim Shen
blurb: First H-Net (hierarchical dynamic chunking) submission: learned boundary detection downsamples sequences into variable-length chunks processed by an inner transformer, then upsamples back via associative scan. 17.5M params, enc=2 inner=5 dec=2 at 512d with GQA+RoPE+Muon.
